reviews.comment:
El sitio ofrece espacios y lugares cómodos para detenerse y descansar durante el viaje. Una observación: ingresa personal de limpieza masculino a limpiar el baño de mujeres.

(Translated by Google)
The site offers comfortable spaces and places to stop and rest during the trip. One observation: male cleaning staff come in to clean the women's restroom.
